post-install-cmd: grep -rl 'libphonenumber' vendor/giggsey/libphonenumberlight/ | xargs sed -i 's/namespace libphonenumber;/namespace libphonenumberlight;/g'
grep -rl 'libphonenumber' vendor/giggsey/libphonenumberlight/ | xargs sed -i 's/use libphonenumber/use libphonenumberlight/g'
post-update-cmd: grep -rl 'libphonenumber' vendor/giggsey/libphonenumberlight/ | xargs sed -i 's/namespace libphonenumber;/namespace libphonenumberlight;/g'
grep -rl 'libphonenumber' vendor/giggsey/libphonenumberlight/ | xargs sed -i 's/use libphonenumber/use libphonenumberlight/g'
